values.content:
=You are an API.

Return ONLY valid JSON.
Do not include explanations.
Do not include text outside JSON.

Format:{{ $('Code in JavaScript2').item.json.question }}

=Reply in 1 or 2 short sentences only.
Keep the answer under 30 words.

User:
{{$json.message}}

User sentence ko analyse karo.
Agar sentence me:
1. Informational question hai
2. Voucher command hai

Toh JSON return karo:

{
  "hasQuestion": true/false,
  "questionText": "...",
  "hasCommand": true/false,
  "commandText": "..."
}
